sections.paragraph: m. pl. fatnesses (of the earth), i.e. fertile meadows. Gen 27:28, “God give thee מִשְׁמַנֵּי הָאָרֶץ fertile meadows,” pr. of fertile meadows, (in the other hemistich, מִטַּל ה׳ of the dew of heaven), but Gen 27:39, מִשְׁמַנֵּי הָאָרֶץ יִהְיֶה מֹושָׁבֶךָ “without [?] the fatness of the earth shall be thy dwelling” (parall. מִטַּל ה׳). In both these places מִשְׁמַנִּים is for מִשְּׁמַנִּים, there is a play of words in the double uses of the particle מִן, which in verse 28 Gen 27:28 must be taken in a partitive sense (see מִן No. 1 ); in verse 39 Gen 27:39 in a privative sense [?] (see מִן No. 3, ).
